title: Add mob preview countdown screen to RPG

log.context: Add mob preview countdown screen to RPG

The feature is fully implemented. Here's a summary of what was done:

---

**What was changed:**

**`commons-server/src/dungeon/dungeon-protocol.ts`**
- Added `DungeonMobRosterMessage` type with fields: `entityName`, `displayName`, `behavior`, `hp`, `atk`, `def`, `spd`, `flavorText`
- Added it to the `DungeonServerMessage` union

**`commons-server/src/dungeon/dungeon-loop.ts`**
- Imported `DungeonMobRosterMessage`
